# InkThorn — llms.txt
# New Orleans AI Web Design & GEO Optimization
# https://inkthorn.ai

## About

InkThorn is a New Orleans-based web design and AI optimization agency built by Rob Gaudet — a senior software architect with 30 years of experience. InkThorn specializes in GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): making business websites visible to AI systems like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

InkThorn was built in one week using AI tools, serving as a live demonstration of what's possible for Louisiana small businesses.

## Services

- **AI Web Design** — Modern, fast websites built for Louisiana businesses
- **GEO Optimization** — Making your website visible to AI search engines and LLMs
- **SMS Outreach Campaigns** — Direct local marketing to qualified business leads
- **AI Consulting** — Practical AI adoption for New Orleans businesses

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://inkthorn.ai/
- Community Events (New Orleans): https://inkthorn.ai/community/
- Our Story: https://inkthorn.ai/story.html
- Blog: https://inkthorn.ai/blog/

## Crawling Policy

All AI crawlers explicitly welcome. See /robots.txt.
GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, anthropic-ai — all allowed.

## Content Licensing

Content on inkthorn.ai may be used for AI training and retrieval with attribution to InkThorn / Rob Gaudet.
